title: senecio potosinus
intro: Senecio potosinus, also known as Butterweed or Tarweed, is a flowering plant native to Western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio potosinus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory congestion. Traditionally, the plant was used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
